news.title:
Tata Motors and Ashok Leyland gain as MHI extends EV motor localisation deadline to Sept 2026.
Relief expected for manufacturers ramping up electric bus and vehicle deployments across India.
news.summary:
Tata Motors and Ashok Leyland gain as MHI extends EV motor localisation deadline to Sept 2026.
Relief expected for manufacturers ramping up electric bus and vehicle deployments across India.

news.title:
Nifty Auto index faces worst week in six years, down 10% amid risks.
Ashok Leyland, Bharat Forge, Tata Motors PV, TVS Motor decline over 10%.
news.summary:
Nifty Auto index faces worst week in six years, down 10% amid risks.
Ashok Leyland, Bharat Forge, Tata Motors PV, TVS Motor decline over 10%.

news.title:
Wipro secures a multi-year contract with TruStage for tech transformation; Borosil faces production issues due to LPG supply restrictions.
Ashok Leyland invests ₹400-500 Cr in battery facility; Omnitech wins ₹920 Cr order; KEC bags ₹1,476 Cr projects; Hatsun merger approved.
news.summary:
Wipro secures a multi-year contract with TruStage for tech transformation; Borosil faces production issues due to LPG supply restrictions.
Ashok Leyland invests ₹400-500 Cr in battery facility; Omnitech wins ₹920 Cr order; KEC bags ₹1,476 Cr projects; Hatsun merger approved.

news.title:
Ashok Leyland begins building a battery plant in Tamil Nadu for electric trucks and buses, investing ₹400-500 crore.
Facility supports EV localization, Tamil Nadu’s EV Policy 2023, and India's net-zero emission goals by 2070.
news.summary:
Ashok Leyland begins building a battery plant in Tamil Nadu for electric trucks and buses, investing ₹400-500 crore.
Facility supports EV localization, Tamil Nadu’s EV Policy 2023, and India's net-zero emission goals by 2070.

news.title:
US-Iran war disrupts chip supply, impacting auto and EMS sectors; Nifty Auto index down 3.6%, led by losses in Samvardhana Motherson, Tata Motors PV, Ashok Leyland.
EMS stocks fall; Dixon Tech hits multi-year low amid rising DRAM prices; Morgan Stanley sets target of ₹8,157 citing headwinds in memory chip costs.
news.summary:
US-Iran war disrupts chip supply, impacting auto and EMS sectors; Nifty Auto index down 3.6%, led by losses in Samvardhana Motherson, Tata Motors PV, Ashok Leyland.
EMS stocks fall; Dixon Tech hits multi-year low amid rising DRAM prices; Morgan Stanley sets target of ₹8,157 citing headwinds in memory chip costs.

news.title:
Middle East tensions may impact Indian auto stocks like Maruti Suzuki, Tata Motors, Hyundai Motor, Ashok Leyland, and Bajaj Auto.
Geopolitical risks threaten Gulf shipping routes, raising costs and weakening order visibility for key export-oriented automakers.
news.summary:
Middle East tensions may impact Indian auto stocks like Maruti Suzuki, Tata Motors, Hyundai Motor, Ashok Leyland, and Bajaj Auto.
Geopolitical risks threaten Gulf shipping routes, raising costs and weakening order visibility for key export-oriented automakers.

news.title:
Ashok Leyland reports February 2026 sales: total domestic vehicles up 28%, exports up 24%.
M&HCV trucks grew 33% in exports; cumulative domestic sales rose 14% across categories.
news.summary:
Ashok Leyland reports February 2026 sales: total domestic vehicles up 28%, exports up 24%.
M&HCV trucks grew 33% in exports; cumulative domestic sales rose 14% across categories.

news.title:
Auto firms like Ashok Leyland, TVS Motor, Bajaj Auto, and Ather Energy face margin pressures due to rising metal costs.
Precious metals surged 35-65% YoY; firms plan price hikes, cost cuts, and product mix strategies to offset inflation impact.
news.summary:
Auto firms like Ashok Leyland, TVS Motor, Bajaj Auto, and Ather Energy face margin pressures due to rising metal costs.
Precious metals surged 35-65% YoY; firms plan price hikes, cost cuts, and product mix strategies to offset inflation impact.

news.title:
Ashok Leyland's subsidiary, Hinduja Leyland Finance, files compliance intimation under SEBI norms.
The disclosure references multiple prior intimations from 2022 to 2025.
news.summary:
Ashok Leyland's subsidiary, Hinduja Leyland Finance, files compliance intimation under SEBI norms.
The disclosure references multiple prior intimations from 2022 to 2025.

news.title:
Ashok Leyland plans expansion in Western India, including Maharashtra.
The company will add 30 new touchpoints to its 150 existing ones.
news.summary:
Ashok Leyland plans expansion in Western India, including Maharashtra.
The company will add 30 new touchpoints to its 150 existing ones.

news.title:
Ashok Leyland's subsidiary, Ashok Leyland West Africa SA, decides to liquidate.
The subsidiary will no longer be part of Ashok Leyland's portfolio.
news.summary:
Ashok Leyland's subsidiary, Ashok Leyland West Africa SA, decides to liquidate.
The subsidiary will no longer be part of Ashok Leyland's portfolio.

news.title:
Ashok Leyland reports a healthy Q3 performance and strong growth prospects.
The company is actively expanding exports to ASEAN countries.
news.summary:
Ashok Leyland reports a healthy Q3 performance and strong growth prospects.
The company is actively expanding exports to ASEAN countries.

news.title:
Ashok Leyland sees no capacity limits for MHCVs/LCVs next year; minor capex of INR 50-100 Cr planned.
OHM, its e-Maas subsidiary, allocates INR 300 Cr for investments, adding to prior INR 300 Cr; may raise more.
news.summary:
Ashok Leyland sees no capacity limits for MHCVs/LCVs next year; minor capex of INR 50-100 Cr planned.
OHM, its e-Maas subsidiary, allocates INR 300 Cr for investments, adding to prior INR 300 Cr; may raise more.

news.title:
Morgan Stanley downgraded Ashok Leyland to Equal Weight from Overweight.
The target price for Ashok Leyland was raised to ₹227 from ₹160.
news.summary:
Morgan Stanley downgraded Ashok Leyland to Equal Weight from Overweight.
The target price for Ashok Leyland was raised to ₹227 from ₹160.

news.title:
Ashok Leyland expects demand momentum to sustain through FY26, projecting 10-12% industry volume growth.
Growth is driven by improved sentiment and rising replacement demand in CV segments.
news.summary:
Ashok Leyland expects demand momentum to sustain through FY26, projecting 10-12% industry volume growth.
Growth is driven by improved sentiment and rising replacement demand in CV segments.

news.title: Ashok Leyland posts Q3 net profit of ₹796 crore, missing forecast of ₹978 crore.
news.summary: Ashok Leyland posts Q3 net profit of ₹796 crore, missing forecast of ₹978 crore.

news.title:
Ashok Leyland reports Q3 EBITDA of ₹15.38B, up from ₹11.94B YoY.
Q3 EBITDA margin improved to 13.4% from 12.65% YoY.
news.summary:
Ashok Leyland reports Q3 EBITDA of ₹15.38B, up from ₹11.94B YoY.
Q3 EBITDA margin improved to 13.4% from 12.65% YoY.

news.title:
335 companies, including M&M, Ashok Leyland, and Lenskart, announce Q3 FY26 earnings today.
M&M shares rose 3% to Rs 3,771.9; Ashok Leyland rose 2% to Rs 213.88; LG Electronics fell 1% to Rs 1,520.4.
news.summary:
335 companies, including M&M, Ashok Leyland, and Lenskart, announce Q3 FY26 earnings today.
M&M shares rose 3% to Rs 3,771.9; Ashok Leyland rose 2% to Rs 213.88; LG Electronics fell 1% to Rs 1,520.4.

news.title:
Over 500 firms, including Coal India, ONGC, HUL, HAL, and IRCTC, will announce Q3FY26 results today.
Key companies include Hindalco Industries and Indian Railway Catering and Tourism Corporation.
news.summary:
Over 500 firms, including Coal India, ONGC, HUL, HAL, and IRCTC, will announce Q3FY26 results today.
Key companies include Hindalco Industries and Indian Railway Catering and Tourism Corporation.

news.title:
Hinduja plans to raise $200M for Ashok Leyland's electric mobility unit.
The company is engaging an adviser to attract global private equity investors.
news.summary:
Hinduja plans to raise $200M for Ashok Leyland's electric mobility unit.
